Los sánguches de milanesa son muy buenos, son para compartir, el de la foto es un sándwich!!Hechos en el momento, nos son congelados ni Dada de eso, muy recomendable para comer algo y seguír camino

The milanesa sandwiches are very good, perfect for sharing. The one in the photo is a sandwich! Made fresh to order, not frozen or anything like that. Highly recommended for a quick bite before continuing your journey.

reviews.comment:
Siempre que paso por aqui paro a visitar al firulais .  Se agradece siempre a quiene les dan refugio a los 4 patas. Los chicos q atienden son lo mas !! Baños super limpios  . Hay cafecito. Y ojala vuelvan hacer sus sandwich de jamon crudo .. q antes de la pandemia era parada obligada alli para degustarlos. Gracias una vez mas por cuidar perritos !! Y a cada quien  pase haganle unos cariños al firu. El en pandemia nos esperaba siempre y aulla de felicidad al volver a vernos !!

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I pass by, I stop to visit Firulais. We're always grateful to those who give shelter to four-legged friends. The guys who run it are the best! The bathrooms are super clean. They have coffee. And I hope they start making their prosciutto sandwiches again... before the pandemic, it was a must-stop to enjoy them. Thanks once again for taking care of the dogs! And everyone who passes by, please give Firu some love. During the pandemic, he was always waiting for us and howled with happiness when he saw us again!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURUbW9fQWN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Mi calificacion va exclusivamente a la comida que sirven, es espectacular , el combustible lamentablemente me rinde menos que en otras estaciones como shell o axion, pero bueno, tema de servicios de comida en el lugar, merienda o lo que sea sin hasta mejores que muchos lugares dedicados exclusivamente a eso, espectacular

(Translated by Google)
My rating goes exclusively to the food they serve, it's spectacular. Unfortunately, the fuel lasts less than at other stations like Shell or Axion, but anyway, regarding food service on site, snacks or whatever, it's even better than many places dedicated exclusively to that. Spectacular.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUbjlhVHdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Gracias a la gestion del @Automobilclubargentino A.C.A. destaco el mantenimiento de los sanitarios en esta estación de servicio, los baños están impecables, quedé un poco sorprendida porque no es común para nada. La fragrancia en el baño fue agradable y no inasiva - como en otros lugares - para tapar los malos olores. Había un olor a limpio.

Felicito a la empleada de maestranza de turno - Gisel.

(Translated by Google)
Thanks to the management of @Automobilclubargentino A.C.A., I would like to highlight the maintenance of the restrooms at this service station. The restrooms are spotless. I was a little surprised because it's not common at all. The fragrance in the restroom was pleasant and not intrusive—as in other places—to mask the unpleasant odors. There was a clean scent.

I congratulate the on-duty garage attendant, Gisel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNUNklQckFnEAE

reviews.comment:
Baños súper limpios y personal amable.
El café con leche no es bueno, tiene sabor a quemado.
Tienen muy buena planificación y productos frescos.
No pertenece a las Full, por lo cual no podes acceder a las promos en su servicompras.

(Translated by Google)
Super clean restrooms and friendly staff.
The coffee with milk isn't good; it tastes burnt. They have excellent planning and fresh products. It's not part of the Full network, so you can't access the promotions at their convenience store.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqdmZPaEZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Buen lugar, la atención es buena. Siempre tienen problemas para cargarte los puntos y los perdes. La licencia internacional ACA carisima sin sentido dura un año y vale lo que un pasaporte, pero no es motivo de la calificación.

(Translated by Google)
Good place, the service is good. They always have problems adding points to your account and you end up losing them. The ACA international driving permit is ridiculously expensive, only lasts a year, and costs as much as a passport, but that's not the reason for the rating.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURqc2JiYjZnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención muy buena olvidaron entregarme un ticket de 28900 de tres menu XXL se los pedí y me dicen te lo entregamos con el despacho lo pegaron en la pared de la ventanilla pero nunca me lo entregaron y  esto fue hoy 24/04 a las 16.00 hs, y preciso rendirlo en la empresa favor de indicarme un número de contacto así me envían la foto del ticket y cambio la calificación a 5 estrellas lo pueden sacar del rollo de auditoría.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good, but they forgot to give me a receipt for 28900 for three XXL meals. I asked for it and they said they'd give it to me with the order. They posted it on the window wall, but they never gave it to me. This happened today, April 24th, at 4:00 PM, and I need to submit it to the company. Please provide me with a contact number so you can send me a photo of the receipt and I'll change my rating to 5 stars. You can also remove it from the audit log.

reviewReply.comment: Puede escribir por mensaje privado y se le brindará una solución
